remarks: Welcome to this well-maintained Co-Op located in the desirable Strawberry Hill area of Stamford. This mid-rise unit offers a comfortable layout featuring 2 bedrooms and 1 full bathroom, all on a single level for convenient living.  The interior includes a spacious living room and bedrooms with hardwood flooring, along with a kitchen equipped with quartz countertops, providing both functionality and style. With approximately 900 square feet of living space, this unit is designed to maximize comfort and efficiency.  Situated within the Hampshire House complex, this property offers access to common laundry facilities and professionally managed grounds. Heat, hot water, and other essential services are included in the common charges, adding value and convenience.  The location provides easy access to nearby shopping, dining, public transportation, and major roadways, making it ideal for a variety of lifestyles.  Whether you are looking for a primary residence instead of renting, this unit presents a great option in a well-established community. The complex is owner-occupied only. This is a smart home. Cats accepted. Some pet restrictions apply towards dogs.  Financing Available!!!  Please note photos are when it was occupied. Property is now empty. The complex is owner-occupied only.
